fields.name: First Rating
fields.description: Submitted your very first event rating.

fields.name: Quick Take
fields.description: Rated an event within 1 hour of it finishing.

fields.name: Hot Streak 7
fields.description: Engaged on the site for 7 consecutive days.

fields.name: Hot Streak 30
fields.description: Maintained an activity streak for 30 days in a row.

fields.name: Multi-Sport Fan
fields.description: Rated events across 3 or more different competitions.

fields.name: Full Weekend
fields.description: Rated every session of a single GP or race weekend.

fields.name: Tournament Completionist
fields.description: Rated every match in a round of a World Cup or Champions League.

fields.name: Crowd Pleaser
fields.description: Received 50 or more likes across all your event ratings.

fields.name: Trusted Voice
fields.description: Gave ratings within 10% of community consensus at least 10 times.

fields.name: Contrarian
fields.description: Earned 10+ likes on a rating that went against the majority.

signals.one_line_internal_note: Egypt achieved a historic 3-1 comeback win against New Zealand, with Salah starring, though the final score was settled before late tension built.
Andrea Kimi Antonelli (Mercedes) dominated the Monaco GP from pole; Charles Leclerc (Ferrari) crashed out from a podium position late due to brake failure, calling it 'borderline dangerous'.
Lewis Hamilton secured his first Ferrari win via a decisive three-stop strategy, ending a long drought, while championship leader Kimi Antonelli retired after taking second.
1-1 draw with a late South Africa equalizer (penalty) for a comeback point after Czech Republic took an early lead.
Cape Verde secured a heroic 0-0 draw against heavily favored Spain, holding on defensively despite Spain's overwhelming shot and possession advantage.
Qatar secures a dramatic 1-1 draw against Switzerland with a 90th-minute equalizer, despite being statistically outplayed, marking a significant comeback.

author: admin
fields.body: Amazing race!! Best of the year

fields.object_repr: Iran vs New Zealand - Tue 16 Jun
Spain vs Cape Verde - Mon 15 Jun
